executives.name: Ken MacKenzie
executives.background: Ken MacKenzie was appointed Chairman in September 2017. He was formerly the Managing Director and CEO of Amcor Limited. He has extensive global experience in complex manufacturing and supply chains.

executives.name: Michael Chaney AO
executives.background: Mr Chaney is currently Chairman of Wesfarmers Limited and was previously Chairman of Woodside Petroleum and National Australia Bank. He was Managing Director of Wesfarmers from 1992 to 2005.

executives.name: Sharon Warburton
executives.background: Ms Warburton is a Chartered Accountant with over 25 years’ experience in the resources and infrastructure sectors. She is a Director of Wesfarmers, Worley, and Blackmores.

executives.name: Terry Bowen
executives.background: Terry Bowen is a former Finance Director of Wesfarmers Limited. He has over 25 years' experience in senior financial and executive roles across various industries.

executives.name: Tom O'Leary
executives.background: Tom O’Leary was appointed Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of Iluka Resources in September 2016. He has previously held senior executive roles at Wesfarmers, including Managing Director of Wesfarmers Chemicals, Energy & Fertilisers. He has a Bachelor of Laws and a Bachelor of Jurisprudence from the University of Western Australia and has completed the Advanced Management Program at Harvard Business School.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director, Wesfarmers Chemicals, Energy & Fertilisers (WesCEF)
